name: Confluence
description: Monitor Confluence spaces and user access for documentation and policy publishing compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens
2. Click 'Create API token'
3. Base64-encode 'your_email:api_token'
4. Paste the encoded string below

credentialFields.label: Base64 Encoded Token
credentialFields.helpText: Base64-encode 'email@example.com:api_token'. Create an API token at id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens

checks.name: Publish Policies
checks.description: Verifies Confluence spaces exist for policy publishing

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Confluence group members for employee access management
